mapper.select: SELECT id, ts_headline('jiebacfg', title, to_tsquery('jiebacfg', b.search_condition), 'StartSel="",StopSel="",HighlightAll=TRUE') AS title, ts_headline('jiebacfg', content, to_tsquery('jiebacfg', b.search_condition), 'StartSel="",StopSel="",HighlightAll=TRUE') AS content, author_id, summary, view_count, comment_count, like_count, favorite_count, status, create_time, update_time, deleted, delete_time FROM post a, (SELECT array_to_string(tsvector_to_array(to_tsvector('jiebacfg', #{keyword})), ' | ') AS search_condition) b WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND a.ts_vector_col @@ to_tsquery('jiebacfg', b.search_condition) ORDER BY ts_rank( setweight(to_tsvector('jiebacfg', a.title), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('jiebacfg', a.content), 'B'), to_tsquery('jiebacfg', b.search_condition) ) DESC, a.create_time DESC

SELECT id, title, content, author_id, summary, view_count, comment_count, like_count, favorite_count, status, create_time, update_time, deleted, delete_time FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY create_time DESC
